text:
Thank you for reaching out to Meridian Home Services!

I'm sorry, but I wasn't able to complete your booking request for an HVAC tune-up at ZIP 22030 on May 15th, 2026 (morning). No changes have been made to your account.

I'd love to help get this sorted for you! Here are a few ways we can assist:

- **Try again** — if you'd like, I can attempt the booking once more.
- **Adjust your request** — perhaps a different date or time window might work.
- **Speak with our team** — our support staff can look into this further for you.

Is there anything else I can help you with? 😊
